## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Demo or walkthrough scenario is discoverable
- [ ] Coverage maps to a roadmap milestone
- [ ] New docs avoid overloading a single large file when possible
- [ ] Automated checks added or updated where appropriate
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
